title: Dressrosa’s Hidden System Emerges
description: Pages 13–16 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Don Chinjao, Luffy, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #20 as luffy and Chinjao fight with the weight of Garp’s past behind them, while Dressrosa’s hidden conflicts keep expanding outside the arena.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You too, little brother!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Wait, I won't fight!! Since I was born...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I've never even fought once!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: He's shown his back!!! These brothers are the worst!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: THE AKE BROKE...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: but I had imbued it with arrangement haki!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What a ridiculously tough body

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Big bro...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Remember someone

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: TH... THAT BASTARD... HE CALLED ME A SHRIMP....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: hurry up and... "wear" me, Bobby!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: kyah hhhhh!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: What in the world is happening here!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: BOO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Kanokuni's Boo has been beaten to a pulp!!! He's already lost consciousness!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: The one punching is...? The feeble younger brother, Bobby!? No! The weakling older brother, Kelly!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Rara RARARA RARAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Seems like the older brother!! But he got huge and appears to be a completely different person !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Now who's the shrimp? Just try sayin' that again...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: And I'll rip out that throat of yours!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And what do we have here? It seems that Lucy's helmet

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: has been stolen away by Jean the bandit!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Oi, give that back!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I heard a strange rumor

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Lucy

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: They say the pirate strawhat Luffy, with a bounty of 400 min

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Has inserted him- self into this tournament ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Dede Dede

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: HMM!?

dialogue.speaker: Don Chinjao
dialogue.text: And over there is Don Chinjao, charging forward with a clear pur- pose!!

dialogue.speaker: Don Chinjao
dialogue.text: If only you could see this, GARP... What I'm about to do to your grandson ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: There are about 40 fighters remaining in C-Block!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And only the biggest names are emerging from the mix!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Who's gonna win this thing!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: A white hot burning battle!!

summary: Pages 13–16 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
